evals.prompt: Write tests for the new CLI command I just added in src/databao_cli/commands/status.py.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads the source module, writes tests in tests/test_status.py using CliRunner, and verifies they pass.
assertions: Agent reads the source module before writing tests
Agent writes tests in the corresponding tests/test_<module>.py file
Agent uses click.testing.CliRunner for CLI command testing
Agent runs `uv run pytest tests/test_status.py -v` or equivalent to verify tests pass
Agent follows one-behavior-per-test convention

evals.prompt: I fixed a bug where `databao build` crashed on empty project directories. Add a regression test.
evals.expected_output: Agent adds a focused regression test for the empty-directory edge case in the build test file.
assertions: Agent reads the bug fix code to understand the behavior change
Agent adds a test specifically for the empty-directory edge case
Agent uses the project_layout fixture or tmp_path for filesystem setup
Agent verifies the test passes with pytest
Agent does NOT add unrelated tests beyond the regression case

evals.prompt: Coverage dropped after my changes. Write tests to bring it back above 80%.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs coverage, identifies uncovered lines, writes targeted tests, and re-verifies coverage.
assertions: Agent runs `make test-cov-check` to identify uncovered lines
Agent reads source files with missing coverage
Agent writes tests targeting the specific uncovered lines
Agent re-runs `make test-cov-check` to verify threshold is met
Agent does NOT add trivial tests or pragma comments just to raise the number

evals.prompt: Write unit tests for the MCP tool I added in src/databao_cli/mcp/tools/.
evals.expected_output: Agent writes tests in tests/test_mcp.py following project conventions, mocking external I/O.
assertions: Agent reads the MCP tool source code first
Agent adds tests in tests/test_mcp.py
Agent mocks external I/O (network, subprocess) but not internal modules
Agent runs tests and verifies they pass
Agent runs `make check` to verify lint and type-check pass
